ogTitle: Noosa Heads vs Noosaville: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Noosa Heads and Noosaville.
heading: Noosa Heads vs Noosaville — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Noosa Heads, Queensland and Noosaville, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Noosaville has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Noosa Heads (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Noosa Heads or Noosaville safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Noosa Heads has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Noosaville scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Noosa Heads scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Noosaville scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Noosa Heads or Noosaville?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Noosaville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
